---
title: "PIMS"
output: html_document
date: "2023-09-18"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ltm)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(kableExtra)
library(patchwork)
library(readxl)
```

#write table
```{r}
data <- read_csv("Rohdaten_P1PIMSABCComplete_DATA_2023-09-17_1849.csv")
#add wave information
data$wave <- cut(as.Date(data$ppatient_admission_date), breaks = c(as.Date("2020-01-01"), as.Date("2021-02-28"), as.Date("2021-06-20"), as.Date("2021-12-26"), as.Date("2023-09-18")), labels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"), include.lowest = TRUE)
write.csv(data, file = "Results/data_wave.csv", row.names = FALSE )
```

#setup
```{r}
#setup
data <- read_csv("Results/data_wave.csv")
data <- data[!is.na(data$wave), ,drop=F]
colors <- c("no_percentage" = "dark red", "yes_percentage" = "cornflowerblue")
colors2 <- c("male_percentage" = "#5F4B8BFF", "female_percentage" = "#E69A8DFF")
colors3<- c("#FF5926", "#172957", "#16C9EF", "#CD9A62")
level=c("W", "A", "D", "O")
dir <- "Results"

```

#Figure 1
```{r}
#weekly numbers
numbers <- c(263, 142, 182, 333)
new_labels <- paste(level, " (n=", numbers, ")", sep="")

week.num <- read_excel("COVID-19-hospitalisiert_PIMS--Faelle_DGPI-Survey2020-2023.xlsx")
week.num$week <- paste0(year(week.num$Datum), "-", week(week.num$Datum))
week.num$week <- sprintf("%s-%02d", sub("-.*", "", week.num$week), as.integer(sub(".*-", "", week.num$week)))
week.num$wave <- cut(as.Date(week.num$Datum), breaks = c(as.Date("2020-01-01"), as.Date("2021-02-28"), as.Date("2021-06-20"), as.Date("2021-12-26"), as.Date("2023-09-18")), labels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"), include.lowest = TRUE)

scaling_factor <- max(week.num$PIMS, na.rm = TRUE) / max(week.num$COVID, na.rm = TRUE)

p <- ggplot(week.num, aes(x = week, fill = factor(wave, levels=level))) +
  geom_bar(aes(y = PIMS), stat = "identity", width=1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=8))+
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = function(x) x[seq(1, length(x), by = 5)])+
  ggtitle("Cases per week")+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "white"),panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey92"))+
  labs(x = "Calendar Week")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(colors3, level), labels = new_labels, name="Wave")

p <- p + geom_line(aes(y = COVID * scaling_factor), color = "#6e0511", group = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous("PIMS cases",
                     sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scaling_factor, name = "Hospitalized COVID cases")) +
    theme(axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "#6e0511"))
p

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Weekly_numbers.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 7)

#Age
res.aov <- aov(ppatient_age_years ~ wave, data = data)
summary(res.aov)
pv_3<- TukeyHSD(res.aov)
pv_3 <- as.data.frame(pv_3$wave)
pv_3$diff <- round(pv_3$diff, 1)
pv_3 <- pv_3[, c("diff", "p adj")]

age <- ggplot(data, aes(x=wave, y=ppatient_age_years))+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = factor(wave, level = level)), color=colors3)+
  labs(x = "Variant of concern", y = "Years")+
  theme_minimal() + 
  ggtitle("Patient age")

age.tab <- tableGrob(round(pv_3, 3))
age.plot<- age+age.tab +plot_layout(ncol = 2)
age.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Age_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 4)

#sex
#one divers in omicron
data$sex <- factor(data$ppatient_gender, levels = c(1, 2, -66), labels = c("male", "female", "divers"))
t2 <- table(data$sex, data$wave)
df2<- as.data.frame(t2)
df2 <- tidyr::spread(df2, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df2) <- c("factor", "male", "female", "divers")
df2$male_percentage <- (df2$male / (df2$male + df2$female + df2$divers)) * 100
df2$female_percentage <- (df2$female / (df2$male + df2$female + df2$divers)) * 100
df_long2 <- gather(df2, key = "Response", value = "percentage", male_percentage, female_percentage)
df_long2$factor <- factor(df_long2$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c2=subset(df2, select= c(factor, male, female))
rownames(df_c2) <- df_c2[,1]
df_c2=subset(df_c2, select= c(male, female))
chi2<- chisq.test(df_c2)

p2 <- ggplot(df_long2, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors2, labels=c("Female", "Male")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Patient sex") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "male_percentage", male, female)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi2$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p2

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/psex_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)


#comorbidity
data$comorbidity <- factor(data$pcomorb_pims_chk, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
t1 <- table(data$comorbidity, data$wave)
df1<- as.data.frame(t1)
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Comorbidity") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/comorbidity_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Adipositas 
data$adipos <- factor(data$pcomorb_other_type___1, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$adipos, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Obesity") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/adipos_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#pulmonal comorbidity
data$pulm <- factor(data$p1_comorb_list___1, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$pulm, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Pulmonary comorbidity") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/pulm_comorb_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)
```

#Figure 2
```{r}
#clinical presentation
#Kawasaki
data$Kawasaki <- factor(data$case_eval_pims, levels = c(1,2,3), labels = c("no", "yes", "yes"))
t23 <- table(data$Kawasaki, data$wave)
df23<- as.data.frame(t23)
df23 <- tidyr::spread(df23, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df23) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df23$no_percentage <- (df23$no / (df23$no + df23$yes)) * 100
df23$yes_percentage <- (df23$yes / (df23$no + df23$yes)) * 100
df_long23 <- gather(df23, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long23$factor <- factor(df_long23$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c23=subset(df23, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c23) <- df_c23[,1]
df_c23=subset(df_c23, select= c(no, yes))
chi23<- chisq.test(df_c23)

p23 <- ggplot(df_long23, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Kawasaki features") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi23$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p23

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Kawasaki_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#respiratory
data$Resp <- factor(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___2, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t12 <- table(data$Resp, data$wave)
df12<- as.data.frame(t12)
df12 <- tidyr::spread(df12, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df12) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df12$no_percentage <- (df12$no / (df12$no + df12$yes)) * 100
df12$yes_percentage <- (df12$yes / (df12$no + df12$yes)) * 100
df_long12 <- gather(df12, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long12$factor <- factor(df_long12$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c12=subset(df12, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c12) <- df_c12[,1]
df_c12=subset(df_c12, select= c(no, yes))
chi12<- chisq.test(df_c12)

p12 <- ggplot(df_long12, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Respiratory") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi12$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p12

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/sympt_Resp_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#pARDS
data$pARDS <- factor(data$pdiag_on_discharge_list___4, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$pARDS, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("pARDS") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/pARDS_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Cardiocirculatory
data$Cardio <- factor(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___3, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t13 <- table(data$Cardio, data$wave)
df13<- as.data.frame(t13)
df13 <- tidyr::spread(df13, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df13) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df13$no_percentage <- (df13$no / (df13$no + df13$yes)) * 100
df13$yes_percentage <- (df13$yes / (df13$no + df13$yes)) * 100
df_long13 <- gather(df13, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long13$factor <- factor(df_long13$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c13=subset(df13, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c13) <- df_c13[,1]
df_c13=subset(df_c13, select= c(no, yes))
chi13<- chisq.test(df_c13)

p13 <- ggplot(df_long13, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Cardiocirculatory") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi13$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p13

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/sympt_Cardio_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Heart failure
data$heartf <- factor(data$pcomp_cardiac_type___4, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$heartf, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Heart failure") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/heartf_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Hypotension
data$hypotens <- factor(data$pcomp_cardiac_type___20, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$hypotens, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Hypotension") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/hypotens_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)


#Liver failure
data$Liver <- factor(data$pcomp_liver_type___1, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t15 <- table(data$Liver, data$wave)
df15<- as.data.frame(t15)
df15 <- tidyr::spread(df15, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df15) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df15$no_percentage <- (df15$no / (df15$no + df15$yes)) * 100
df15$yes_percentage <- (df15$yes / (df15$no + df15$yes)) * 100
df_long15 <- gather(df15, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long15$factor <- factor(df_long15$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c15=subset(df15, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c15) <- df_c15[,1]
df_c15=subset(df_c15, select= c(no, yes))
chi15<- chisq.test(df_c15)

p15 <- ggplot(df_long15, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Liver failure") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi15$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p15

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Liver_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Kidney failure
data$Kidney <- factor(data$pcomp_kidney_type___1, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t16 <- table(data$Kidney, data$wave)
df16<- as.data.frame(t16)
df16 <- tidyr::spread(df16, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df16) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df16$no_percentage <- (df16$no / (df16$no + df16$yes)) * 100
df16$yes_percentage <- (df16$yes / (df16$no + df16$yes)) * 100
df_long16 <- gather(df16, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long16$factor <- factor(df_long16$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c16=subset(df16, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c16) <- df_c16[,1]
df_c16=subset(df_c16, select= c(no, yes))
chi16<- chisq.test(df_c16)

p16 <- ggplot(df_long16, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Kidney failure") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi16$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p16

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Kidney_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Stomach pain
data$stompain <- factor(data$pcomp_gastro_type___10, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$stompain, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Stomach pain") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/stompain_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Weight loss
data$weight <- factor(data$pcomp_gastro_type___16, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$weight, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Weight loss") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/weight_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Taste loss
data$Taste <- factor(data$pcomp_ent_type___3, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$Taste, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Taste loss") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Taste_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Musculosceletal
data$Musculosceletal <- factor(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___8, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t18 <- table(data$Musculosceletal, data$wave)
df18<- as.data.frame(t18)
df18 <- tidyr::spread(df18, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df18) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df18$no_percentage <- (df18$no / (df18$no + df18$yes)) * 100
df18$yes_percentage <- (df18$yes / (df18$no + df18$yes)) * 100
df_long18 <- gather(df18, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long18$factor <- factor(df_long18$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c18=subset(df18, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c18) <- df_c18[,1]
df_c18=subset(df_c18, select= c(no, yes))
chi18<- chisq.test(df_c18)

p18 <- ggplot(df_long18, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Musculosceletal") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi18$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p18

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/sympt_Musculosceletal_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)
```

#Figure 3
```{r}
#lab markers
#CRP
table(data$plab_crp_si_value)
res.aov <- aov(plab_crp_si_value ~ wave, data = data)
summary(res.aov)
pv_4<- TukeyHSD(res.aov)
pv_4 <- as.data.frame(pv_4$wave)
pv_4$diff <- round(pv_4$diff, 1)
pv_4 <- pv_4[, c("diff", "p adj")]

crp <- ggplot(data, aes(x=wave, y=plab_crp_si_value))+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = factor(wave, level = level)), color=colors3)+
  labs(x = "Variant of concern", y = "mg/l")+
  theme_minimal() + 
  ggtitle("CRP")

crp.tab <- tableGrob(round(pv_4, 3))
crp.plot<- crp+crp.tab +plot_layout(ncol = 2)
crp.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/CRP_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 4)

#proBNP
res.aov <- aov(plab_probnp_si_value ~ wave, data = data)
summary(res.aov)
pv_7<- TukeyHSD(res.aov)
pv_7 <- as.data.frame(pv_7$wave)
pv_7$diff <- round(pv_7$diff, 1)
pv_7 <- pv_7[, c("diff", "p adj")]

probnp <- ggplot(data, aes(x=wave, y=plab_probnp_si_value))+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = factor(wave, level = level)), color=colors3)+
  labs(x = "Variant of concern", y = "pg/ml (log10)")+
  theme_minimal() + 
  ggtitle("proBNP")+
  scale_y_log10()

probnp.tab <- tableGrob(round(pv_7, 3))
probnp.plot<- probnp+probnp.tab +plot_layout(ncol = 2)
probnp.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/proBNP_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 4)

#Troponin T
res.aov <- aov(plab_tropon_ti_si_value ~ wave, data = data)
summary(res.aov)
pv_8<- TukeyHSD(res.aov)
pv_8 <- as.data.frame(pv_8$wave)
pv_8$diff <- round(pv_8$diff, 1)
pv_8 <- pv_8[, c("diff", "p adj")]

tropt <- ggplot(data, aes(x=wave, y=plab_tropon_ti_si_value))+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = factor(wave, level = level)), color=colors3)+
  labs(x = "Variant of concern", y = "pg/ml (log10)")+
  theme_minimal() + 
  ggtitle("Troponin T")+
  scale_y_log10()

tropt.tab <- tableGrob(round(pv_8, 3))
tropt.plot<- tropt+tropt.tab +plot_layout(ncol = 2)
tropt.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Troponin T_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 4)

#D-Dimere
res.aov <- aov(plab_ddimere_si_value ~ wave, data = data)
summary(res.aov)
pv_9<- TukeyHSD(res.aov)
pv_9 <- as.data.frame(pv_9$wave)
pv_9$diff <- round(pv_9$diff, 1)
pv_9 <- pv_9[, c("diff", "p adj")]

ddim <- ggplot(data, aes(x=wave, y=plab_ddimere_si_value))+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = factor(wave, level = level)), color=colors3)+
  labs(x = "Variant of concern", y = "mg/l (log10)")+
  theme_minimal() + 
  ggtitle("D-dimers")+
  scale_y_log10()

ddim.tab <- tableGrob(round(pv_9, 3))
ddim.plot<- ddim+ddim.tab +plot_layout(ncol = 2)
ddim.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/D-Dimers_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 4)
```

#Figure 4
```{r}
#Coinfection pulmo
data$coinfection <- factor(data$p1_coinfect_list___2, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
df24<- as.data.frame(table(data$coinfection, data$wave))
df24 <- tidyr::spread(df24, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df24) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df24$no_percentage <- (df24$no / (df24$no + df24$yes)) * 100
df24$yes_percentage <- (df24$yes / (df24$no + df24$yes)) * 100
df_long24 <- gather(df24, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long24$factor <- factor(df_long24$factor, levels = level)

df_c24=subset(df24, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c24) <- df_c24[,1]
df_c24=subset(df_c24, select= c(no, yes))
chi24<- chisq.test(df_c24)

p24 <- ggplot(df_long24, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Bacterial coinfection") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi24$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p24

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Coinfection_lung.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Coinfection pulmo - viral
data$coinfection_vir <- factor(data$p1_coinfect_list___1, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
df26<- as.data.frame(table(data$coinfection_vir, data$wave))
df26 <- tidyr::spread(df26, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df26) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df26$no_percentage <- (df26$no / (df26$no + df26$yes)) * 100
df26$yes_percentage <- (df26$yes / (df26$no + df26$yes)) * 100
df_long26 <- gather(df26, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long26$factor <- factor(df_long26$factor, levels = level)

df_c26=subset(df26, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c26) <- df_c26[,1]
df_c26=subset(df_c26, select= c(no, yes))
chi26<- chisq.test(df_c26)

p26 <- ggplot(df_long26, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Viral coinfection") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi26$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p26

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Coinfection_lung-viral.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)


#imaging
#infiltrates
data$infil <- factor(data$pimg_thor_infil_yesno, levels = c(0,1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$infil[is.na(data$infil)] <- "unknown"
df28<- as.data.frame(table(data$infil, data$wave))
df28 <- tidyr::spread(df28, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df28) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df28$no_percentage <- (df28$no / (df28$no + df28$yes + df28$unknown)) * 100
df28$yes_percentage <- (df28$yes / (df28$no + df28$yes + df28$unknown)) * 100
df_long28 <- gather(df28, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long28$factor <- factor(df_long28$factor, levels = level)

df_c28=subset(df28, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c28) <- df_c28[,1]
df_c28=subset(df_c28, select= c(no, yes))
chi28<- chisq.test(df_c28)

p28 <- ggplot(df_long28, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Pulmonary infiltrates") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi28$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p28

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/infiltrates_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Pleural effusion
data$pleur <- factor(data$pimg_thor_pleur_yesno, levels = c(0, 1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$pleur[is.na(data$pleur)] <- "unknown"
df29<- as.data.frame(table(data$pleur, data$wave))
df29 <- tidyr::spread(df29, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df29) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df29$no_percentage <- (df29$no / (df29$no + df29$yes + df29$unknown)) * 100
df29$yes_percentage <- (df29$yes / (df29$no + df29$yes + df29$unknown)) * 100
df_long29 <- gather(df29, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long29$factor <- factor(df_long29$factor, levels = level)

df_c29=subset(df29, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c29) <- df_c29[,1]
df_c29=subset(df_c29, select= c(no, yes))
chi29<- chisq.test(df_c29)

p29 <- ggplot(df_long29, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Pleural effusion") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi29$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p29

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Pleural effusion_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Pericardial effusion
data$peric <- factor(data$pimg_echo_pericard_yesno, levels = c(0, 1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$peric[is.na(data$peric)] <- "unknown"
df31<- as.data.frame(table(data$peric, data$wave))
df31 <- tidyr::spread(df31, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df31) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df31$no_percentage <- (df31$no / (df31$no + df31$yes + df31$unknown)) * 100
df31$yes_percentage <- (df31$yes / (df31$no + df31$yes + df31$unknown)) * 100
df_long31 <- gather(df31, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long31$factor <- factor(df_long31$factor, levels = level)

df_c31=subset(df31, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c31) <- df_c31[,1]
df_c31=subset(df_c31, select= c(no, yes))
chi31<- chisq.test(df_c31)

p31 <- ggplot(df_long31, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Pericardial effusion") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi31$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p31

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Pericardial effusion_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Myocardial dysfunction
data$myoc <- factor(data$pimg_echo_myocard_yesno, levels = c(0, 1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$myoc[is.na(data$myoc)] <- "unknown"
df32<- as.data.frame(table(data$myoc, data$wave))
df32 <- tidyr::spread(df32, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df32) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df32$no_percentage <- (df32$no / (df32$no + df32$yes + df32$unknown)) * 100
df32$yes_percentage <- (df32$yes / (df32$no + df32$yes + df32$unknown)) * 100
df_long32 <- gather(df32, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long32$factor <- factor(df_long32$factor, levels = level)

df_c32=subset(df32, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c32) <- df_c32[,1]
df_c32=subset(df_c32, select= c(no, yes))
chi32<- chisq.test(df_c32)

p32 <- ggplot(df_long32, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Myocardial dysfunction") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi32$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p32

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Myocardial dysfunction_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Ascites
data$ascites <- factor(data$pimg_abdo_aszit_yesno, levels = c(0,1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$ascites[is.na(data$ascites)] <- "unknown"
df27<- as.data.frame(table(data$ascites, data$wave))
df27 <- tidyr::spread(df27, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df27) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df27$no_percentage <- (df27$no / (df27$no + df27$yes + df27$unknown)) * 100
df27$yes_percentage <- (df27$yes / (df27$no + df27$yes + df27$unknown)) * 100
df_long27 <- gather(df27, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long27$factor <- factor(df_long27$factor, levels = level)

df_c27=subset(df27, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c27) <- df_c27[,1]
df_c27=subset(df_c27, select= c(no, yes))
chi27<- chisq.test(df_c27)

p27 <- ggplot(df_long27, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Ascites") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi27$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p27

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/ascites.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#colon
data$colon <- factor(data$pimg_abdo_colon_yesno, levels = c(0, 1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$colon[is.na(data$colon)] <- "unknown"
df33<- as.data.frame(table(data$colon, data$wave))
df33 <- tidyr::spread(df33, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df33) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df33$no_percentage <- (df33$no / (df33$no + df33$yes + df33$unknown)) * 100
df33$yes_percentage <- (df33$yes / (df33$no + df33$yes + df33$unknown)) * 100
df_long33 <- gather(df33, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long33$factor <- factor(df_long33$factor, levels = level)

df_c33=subset(df33, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c33) <- df_c33[,1]
df_c33=subset(df_c33, select= c(no, yes))
chi33<- chisq.test(df_c33)

p33 <- ggplot(df_long33, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Bowel wall thickening") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi33$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p33

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Colon_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Abdominal lymphadenopathy
data$lymph <- factor(data$pimg_abdo_lymph_yesno, levels = c(0, 1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$lymph[is.na(data$lymph)] <- "unknown"
df34<- as.data.frame(table(data$lymph, data$wave))
df34 <- tidyr::spread(df34, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df34) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df34$no_percentage <- (df34$no / (df34$no + df34$yes + df34$unknown)) * 100
df34$yes_percentage <- (df34$yes / (df34$no + df34$yes + df34$unknown)) * 100
df_long34 <- gather(df34, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long34$factor <- factor(df_long34$factor, levels = level)

df_c34=subset(df34, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c34) <- df_c34[,1]
df_c34=subset(df_c34, select= c(no, yes))
chi34<- chisq.test(df_c34)

p34 <- ggplot(df_long34, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Abdominal lymphadenopathy") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi34$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p34

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Abdominal lymphadenopathy_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#Splenomegaly
data$splenomeg <- factor(data$pimg_abdo_splen_yesno, levels = c(0, 1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$splenomeg[is.na(data$splenomeg)] <- "unknown"
df27<- as.data.frame(table(data$splenomeg, data$wave))
df27 <- tidyr::spread(df27, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df27) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df27$no_percentage <- (df27$no / (df27$no + df27$yes + df27$unknown)) * 100
df27$yes_percentage <- (df27$yes / (df27$no + df27$yes + df27$unknown)) * 100
df_long27 <- gather(df27, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long27$factor <- factor(df_long27$factor, levels = level)

df_c27=subset(df27, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c27) <- df_c27[,1]
df_c27=subset(df_c27, select= c(no, yes))
chi27<- chisq.test(df_c27)

p27 <- ggplot(df_long27, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Splenomegaly") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi27$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p27

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Splenomegaly_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)
```

#Figure 5
```{r}
#Intensive care
data$ICU <- factor(data$p1_thr_pims_list___1, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t4 <- table(data$ICU, data$wave)
df4<- as.data.frame(t4)
df4 <- tidyr::spread(df4, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df4) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df4$no_percentage <- (df4$no / (df4$no + df4$yes)) * 100
df4$yes_percentage <- (df4$yes / (df4$no + df4$yes)) * 100
df_long4 <- gather(df4, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long4$factor <- factor(df_long4$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c4=subset(df4, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c4) <- df_c4[,1]
df_c4=subset(df_c4, select= c(no, yes))
chi4<- chisq.test(df_c4)

p4 <- ggplot(df_long4, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("ICU") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi4$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p4

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/ICU_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)


#therapies
#Steroids
data$Steroids <- factor(data$pther_immun_mod_type___2, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t8 <- table(data$Steroids, data$wave)
df8<- as.data.frame(t8)
df8 <- tidyr::spread(df8, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df8) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df8$no_percentage <- (df8$no / (df8$no + df8$yes)) * 100
df8$yes_percentage <- (df8$yes / (df8$no + df8$yes)) * 100
df_long8 <- gather(df8, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long8$factor <- factor(df_long8$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c8=subset(df8, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c8) <- df_c8[,1]
df_c8=subset(df_c8, select= c(no, yes))
chi8<- chisq.test(df_c8)

p8 <- ggplot(df_long8, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Steroids") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi8$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p8

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Steroids_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#IVIGs
data$IVIGs <- factor(data$pther_immun_mod_type___13, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("no", "yes"))
t9 <- table(data$IVIGs, data$wave)
df9<- as.data.frame(t9)
df9 <- tidyr::spread(df9, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df9) <- c("factor", "no", "yes")
df9$no_percentage <- (df9$no / (df9$no + df9$yes)) * 100
df9$yes_percentage <- (df9$yes / (df9$no + df9$yes)) * 100
df_long9 <- gather(df9, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long9$factor <- factor(df_long9$factor, levels = c("W", "A", "D", "O"))

df_c9=subset(df9, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c9) <- df_c9[,1]
df_c9=subset(df_c9, select= c(no, yes))
chi9<- chisq.test(df_c9)

p9 <- ggplot(df_long9, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("IVIGs") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi9$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p9

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/IVIGs_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#inpatientdays
res.aov <- aov(pther_inpatient_days ~ wave, data = data)
summary(res.aov)
pv_1<- TukeyHSD(res.aov)
pv_1 <- as.data.frame(pv_1$wave)
pv_1$diff <- round(pv_1$diff, 1)
pv_1 <- pv_1[, c("diff", "p adj")]
pv_1

inpat <- ggplot(data, aes(x=wave, y=pther_inpatient_days))+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = factor(wave, level = level)), color=colors3)+
  labs(x = "Variant of concern", y = "Days")+
  theme_minimal() + 
  ggtitle("Days of hospitalization")

inpat.tab <- tableGrob(round(pv_1, 3))
inpat.plot<- inpat+inpat.tab +plot_layout(ncol = 2)
inpat.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/Inpatient days_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 4)

#Number of organsystem involvement
data$clin_score <- rowSums(data[, c("p1_sy_sympt_type___1", "p1_sy_sympt_type___2", "p1_sy_sympt_type___3", "p1_sy_sympt_type___4", "p1_sy_sympt_type___5", "p1_sy_sympt_type___6", "p1_sy_sympt_type___7", "p1_sy_sympt_type___8", "p1_sy_sympt_type___9", "p1_sy_sympt_type___10", "p1_sy_sympt_type___11", "p1_sy_sympt_type___12", "p1_sy_sympt_type___13", "p1_sy_sympt_type___14")])

res.aov <- aov(clin_score ~ wave, data = data)
summary(res.aov)
pv_1<- TukeyHSD(res.aov)
pv_1 <- as.data.frame(pv_1$wave)
pv_1$diff <- round(pv_1$diff, 1)
pv_1 <- pv_1[, c("diff", "p adj")]

c_s <- ggplot(data, aes(x=wave, y=clin_score))+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = factor(wave, level = level)), color=colors3)+
  labs(x = "Variant of concern", y = "N° of organ systems")+
  theme_minimal() + 
  ggtitle("N° of affected organ systems")
c_s.tab <- tableGrob(round(pv_1, 4))
c_s.plot<- c_s+c_s.tab +plot_layout(ncol = 2)
c_s.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/N° of organ systems.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 4)

```

#Figure 6
```{r}
#Aneurysm
data$aneur <- factor(data$pimg_echo_coroneury_yesno, levels = c(0, 1, -99), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
data$aneur[is.na(data$aneur)] <- "unknown"
df30<- as.data.frame(table(data$aneur, data$wave))
df30 <- tidyr::spread(df30, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df30) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df30$no_percentage <- (df30$no / (df30$no + df30$yes + df30$unknown)) * 100
df30$yes_percentage <- (df30$yes / (df30$no + df30$yes + df30$unknown)) * 100
df_long30 <- gather(df30, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long30$factor <- factor(df_long30$factor, levels = level)

df_c30=subset(df30, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c30) <- df_c30[,1]
df_c30=subset(df_c30, select= c(no, yes))
chi30<- chisq.test(df_c30)

p30 <- ggplot(df_long30, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Coronary aneurysm") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi30$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+
  ylim(0,100)

p30

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/aneurysm_plot.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

#outcome
colors.out <- c("#c82c01","#92ffc4", "#6897bb") 
level.out <- c("Irrev_percentage", "Rev_percentage", "Rest_percentage")

data$outcome <- factor(data$p1_outcome_list, levels = c(1,2, 3, -88), labels = c("Restitutio", "Reversible", "Irreversible", "Unknown"))
out <- as.data.frame(table(data$outcome, data$wave))
out <- tidyr::spread(out, Var1, Freq)
out$Rest_percentage <- (out$Restitutio / (out$Restitutio + out$Reversible + out$Irreversible + out$Unknown)) * 100

out$Rev_percentage <- (out$Reversible  / (out$Restitutio + out$Reversible + out$Irreversible + out$Unknown)) * 100

out$Irrev_percentage <- (out$Irreversible  / (out$Restitutio + out$Reversible + out$Irreversible + out$Unknown)) * 100

out_long <- gather(out, key = "Response", value = "percentage", Rest_percentage, Rev_percentage, Irrev_percentage)
out_long$Var2 <- factor(out_long$Var2, levels = level)

out_long$Response <- factor(out_long$Response, levels = level.out)

data$Irrev <- data$outcome == 'Irreversible'
c.out <- table(data$wave, data$Irrev)
chi_out <- chisq.test(c.out)
chi_out

data$Rev <- data$outcome == 'Reversible'
c.rev.out <- table(data$wave, data$Rev)
chi_rev_out <- chisq.test(c.rev.out)
chi_rev_out

out.plot<- ggplot(out_long, aes(x = Var2, y=percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(position = "stack", stat="identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors.out, labels = c("Irreversible", "Reversible", "Restitutio")) +
  scale_y_continuous(name="Percentage", breaks=c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100), limits=c(0,110))+
  xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Outcome") + 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("Irreversible: p=", round(chi_out$p.value, 3)), hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("Reversible: p=", round(chi_rev_out$p.value, 3)), hjust=1, vjust=3, size = 3)
out.plot

ggsave(filename = paste0(dir, "/outcome.png"), dpi=600, height = 3, width = 3)

```

#calculations
```{r}
#calculations
#ENT
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___1))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___1, data$wave))

#resp
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___2))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___2, data$wave))

#Cardio
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___3))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___3, data$wave))

#GIT
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___4))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___4, data$wave))

#liver
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_liver_type___1))
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_liver_type___1, data$wave))

#kidney
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_kidney_type___1))
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_kidney_type___1, data$wave))

#neuro
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___7))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___7, data$wave))

#musculosceletal
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___8))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___8, data$wave))

#psych
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___9))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___9, data$wave))

#hemato
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___10))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___10, data$wave))

#autoimmune
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___11))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___11, data$wave))

#skin
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___12))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___12, data$wave))

#mucosa
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___13))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___13, data$wave))

#fever
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___14))
prop.table(table(data$p1_sy_sympt_type___14, data$wave))

#taste loss
prop.table(table(dataW$pcomp_ent_type___3))
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_ent_type___3, data$wave))

mean(data$plab_crp_si_value, na.rm=T)
mean(data$plab_ddimere_si_value, na.rm=T)
mean(data$plab_probnp_si_value, na.rm=T)
mean(data$plab_tropon_ti_si_value, na.rm=T)
mean(data$plab_quick_value, na.rm=T)
mean(data$plab_thrombocyte_si_value, na.rm=T)
mean(data$plab_lymphocyte_si_value, na.rm=T)


dataW <- subset(data, wave=="W")
dataA <- subset(data, wave=="A")
dataD <- subset(data, wave=="D")
dataO <- subset(data, wave=="O")

prop.table(table(dataW$outcome))
prop.table(table(dataA$outcome))
prop.table(table(dataD$outcome))
prop.table(table(dataO$outcome))

prop.table(table(data$outcome))

#adipositas
prop.table(table(data$pcomorb_other_type___1))
prop.table(table(data$pcomorb_other_type___1, data$wave))

#pulmo comorb
prop.table(table(data$p1_comorb_list___1))
prop.table(table(data$p1_comorb_list___1, data$wave))

#other comorb
table(data$p1_comorb_list___9, data$wave)

#pARDS
prop.table(table(data$pdiag_on_discharge_list___4))
prop.table(table(data$pdiag_on_discharge_list___4, data$wave))

#Beatmung
pther_artif_resp_type
prop.table(table(data$pther_artif_resp_type___3))
prop.table(table(data$pther_artif_resp_type___3, data$wave))
prop.table(table(dataW$pther_artif_resp_type___3))
prop.table(table(dataO$pther_artif_resp_type___3))

#heart failure

prop.table(table(data$pcomp_cardiac_type___4))
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_cardiac_type___4, data$wave))

#hypotension
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_cardiac_type___20))
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_cardiac_type___20, data$wave))

#stomach pain
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_gastro_type___10))
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_gastro_type___10, data$wave))

#weight loss
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_gastro_type___16))
prop.table(table(data$pcomp_gastro_type___16, data$wave))


```

#exploration
```{r}
data$expl <- factor(data$pcomp_liver_type___1, levels = c(0, 1, -88), labels = c("no", "yes", "unknown"))
df1<- as.data.frame(table(data$expl, data$wave))
df1 <- tidyr::spread(df1, Var1, Freq)
colnames(df1) <- c("factor", "no", "yes", "unknown")
df1$no_percentage <- (df1$no / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df1$yes_percentage <- (df1$yes / (df1$no + df1$yes + df1$unknown)) * 100
df_long1 <- gather(df1, key = "Response", value = "percentage", no_percentage, yes_percentage)
df_long1$factor <- factor(df_long1$factor, levels = level)

df_c1=subset(df1, select= c(factor, no, yes))
rownames(df_c1) <- df_c1[,1]
df_c1=subset(df_c1, select= c(no, yes))
chi1<- chisq.test(df_c1)

p1 <- ggplot(df_long1, aes(x = factor, y = percentage, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  theme_minimal() +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors, labels = c("No", "Yes")) + 
  ylab("Percentage") + xlab("Variant of concern") + 
  ggtitle("Exploration") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Response == "no_percentage", no, yes)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black")+ 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste("p-value:", round(chi1$p.value, 3)),hjust=1, vjust=1, size = 3)
p1
```
